title: Hydration
description: this Mod adds a thirst system to Minecraft.
body:
![Water Boiler MultiBlock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abab881aa8781b9d94946c92a9c7408ac357b8fa.png)

# 🧊 Hydration Mod

 
Survive the heat. Stay hydrated.

Hydration is a survival-focused Minecraft mod that introduces a thirst system to the game, making water management just as important as food. Monitor your hydration level, find water sources, and stay alive.

## 🔹 Features:
- Thirst Bar: A new UI element tracks your hydration.
  
- Purified vs Dirty Water: Not all water is safe to drink — purify dirty water before consuming.
  
- Water Boiler: Craft and use this block to turn dirty water into drinkable water.
  
- Canteen: Carry water with you to stay hydrated on the go.
  
- Dehydration Effects: Ignoring thirst leads to weakness and slowness.

- Water Filter Straw: A portable solution that lets you drink directly from water sources without needing purification.


> _More mechanics and content coming in future updates!_
